description: Free FX rate API backed by the European Central Bank reference rates. No API key required. ~30 currencies, daily updates, full history back to 1999.

latest.notes: Most recent rates. Optional: ?base=USD&symbols=BRL,EUR. Returns { amount, base, date, rates: {...} }.

historical.notes: Rate on a specific date. :date in YYYY-MM-DD. Same query params as /latest.

timeseries.notes: Daily rates between two dates. Path :start..:end (e.g. /v1/2024-01-01..2024-12-31). Hard-cap is one year per call upstream.

currencies.notes: List supported currency codes and their full names.
